---
title: "Hands-on Exercise 1"
author: "Cao Jinming"
date: "17 April 2026"
date-modified: "last-modified"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: true
format: html
---

## Loading Tidyverse

this code chunk use pacman's p_load() to load tidyverse faimly of package into R environment

```{r}
pacman::p_load(tidyverse)

```

```{r}
exam_data = read.csv("../data/wk1/Exam_data.csv")
```
